diagnostics.message: Extension property 'WordCount' cannot be accessed with null-conditional member access '?.' for receiver type 'string?'; TypeSharp-owned null-conditional extension-property access is not supported in this slice. Use ordinary member access after narrowing nullable receivers until nullable receiver lifting is implemented.

Extension property 'WordCount' cannot be assigned with null-conditional member access '?.' for receiver type 'string?'; extension properties are getter-only and TypeSharp-owned null-conditional extension-property assignment is not supported in this slice. Use ordinary member access after narrowing nullable receivers until nullable receiver lifting and setters are implemented.
